operation_mapping.navigate_page: Use Codex browser or web tooling to open result, product, and supplier pages
operation_mapping.read_visible_content: Read only visible page content and mirror-visible metadata
operation_mapping.open_supplier_or_product_link: Traverse shortlisted supplier and product links in the same run
operation_mapping.write_markdown_report: Write or return a supplier-first Markdown report
operation_mapping.normalize_final_output: Persist the canonical Markdown report artifact; if the host output is already clean, keep the raw and canonical outputs identical

constraints: direct 1688 availability depends on the current Codex browsing environment
notes: Current validation status is partial because mirror-assisted evidence is proven but direct 1688 access was not proven in the same environment.

A direct-site recheck on April 16, 2026 found that direct search still degraded into an anti-bot punish flow while direct product detail HTML was reachable outside the browser tool; browser-readable validated_direct support is still not justified.
